raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Klings KUNGS irr
man to Austi atdarrijs/ un es ne
efinu pahrgalwigs/ un ne at-
kabpin atpakkat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es dewu fawu Muggurn
teen/ kas manni fitte/ un man-
nus Waigus teen/ kas man tohs
Mattus ispluhze/ es ne apfleh-
pu fawu Waigu no Neewafcha-
nas un Sptandatahm.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Klings KUNGS
palihds man/ tadeht es ne tob-
pu Kauna. Tapehz efmu es
fawu Waigu lizzis ka weenu
Krainmu/ jo es finnu/ ka es Kan-
nâ ne tapshu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Wiꞥsch irr tuwu/ kas man-
ni tatsno/ kas grib ar utan bahr-
tees? sa-eefim kehpa/ kursch irr
kain Teefa prett mann irr? tas
lai pee man ateet.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redsi/ tas Klings KUNGS
palihds man/ kursch irr tas/ kas
manni pasuddinahs? Raugi/ tee
wiſſi nodils ka kahda Drehbe/
Rustoni tohs ehdihs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kursch irr juhsu Starpâ/
kas to KUNGU bihstahs/ kas to
Balti winna Kalpa klaufa? kas
Tumfibâ staiga/ kur Gaismas
newaid? ka tas pataujahs us to
Wahrdn ta KUNGA/ un palai-
schahs us fawu Deewu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Redsi/ juhs wiſſi/ kas
juhs Ugguni kurrat ar Leeſinahm
apbruukoti/ staigajt gann ilgi
juhsu Ugguns Gaisinâ/ un eekſch
tahm Leeſmahm/ ko juhs effati-
wu klaht/ manna Pestifchana
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Apfohlischana laizigas un muhſchigas Iſpeſtie-
chanas to Tizzigu no wiſahm Behbahm : 1.
Tapehz teem eekſch Nelaimibas un Krusta ne
buhs mastizzigerm nedß nepazettigerm
buht: 7 Jo Decws to Bikkeri jawas
Bahrsibas no teem atjems/ un teem Eennaid-
nekeem dohs isbsert : 21.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Lautajt man/ juhs kas
juhs tai Taifnibai pak-
kaſdsennatees/ kas juhs
to KUNGU nieklejat. Usluhko-
jeet to Akminna-Kalnu / no ka
juhs eſtat zirsti/ un tahs Akkas-
Bedri/ no ka juhs eſtat israkti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Usluhkojeet to Abbrââmm
juhsu Tehwu / un Saru/ kas
juhs irr dsemdejſi. Jo es aizina-
ju wiſſu/ kad wiꞥsch wehl weens
pats bija/ un fwchtiju winzu/
un wairoju winzu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS ee-
preezinahs Zianu/ wiꞥsch eepree-
zinahs wiſſas winnas tuſchas
Weetas / un darrihs winnas
Tuſhuesi ka Eedeni/ un winnas
Launu ka ta KUNGA Dahrsu/
Breekß un Libgſmiba taps eekſch
tahs atrasta/ Pateifschana un
teizamas Dseefinas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Remmeet manni wehrâ
manni Laudis/ atgreeſeet pee
man to Austi inanni Peederri-
gee/ jo no mannim iſees weena
Bausliba/ un es gan drihs eezel-
schu fawu Teefupar to Lauscho
Gaischunu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Manna Taifniba ier tu-
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
